home.noPlansDescription: Explore amazing activities and dining experiences
home.whatToDo: What would you like to do today?

onboarding.homeDescription: See your daily schedule, upcoming bookings, and personalized suggestions all in one place.
onboarding.activitiesDescription: Explore diving, excursions, spa treatments, and more. Book directly from your phone.
onboarding.diningDescription: Browse restaurants and reserve tables for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
onboarding.bookingsDescription: View all your bookings, make changes, or cancel if plans change.
onboarding.loyaltyDescription: Collect points on every booking and unlock exclusive perks with our loyalty program.

suggestions.excursionDescription: Explore the island with a half-day adventure
suggestions.dinnerDescription: Secure your table for a memorable evening
suggestions.todayDescription: See what is available right now

dining.title: Dining
dining.subtitle: Reserve your table
dining.noRestaurantsDescription: Please check back later for dining options
dining.fullyBookedDescription: All tables are reserved for this date. Please try another date or contact the front desk.
dining.cutoffDescription: Reservation cutoff has passed. Please contact the front desk for assistance.

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.subtitle: Manage your activity and dining reservations
bookings.noBookingsDescription: You have not made any bookings during your stay

booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Any dietary requirements or special needs?
booking.bookingClosesHours: Online booking closes {{hours}}h before start time
booking.cancelOnlineHours: You can cancel online up to {{hours}}h before
booking.cancelOnlineMinutes: You can cancel online up to {{minutes}} minutes before
booking.roomAlreadyBooked: Your room already has a booking for this activity session. All guests in room {{room}} can view this booking.
booking.sessionNotAvailable: This activity session is no longer available for booking.
booking.slotNotAvailable: This time slot is no longer available for booking.
booking.tableConfirmed: Your table at {{restaurant}} on {{date}} at {{time}} is confirmed.
booking.tableRequested: We have sent your request for {{restaurant}} on {{date}} at {{time}}.
booking.activityConfirmed: Your booking for {{activity}} on {{date}} at {{time}} is confirmed.
booking.activityRequested: We have sent your request for {{activity}} on {{date}} at {{time}}.
booking.willConfirmTable: We will confirm your table as soon as possible.
booking.willConfirmBooking: We will confirm this as soon as possible.
booking.viewOrCancelBookings: You can view or cancel this in My Bookings.
booking.findInBookings: You can find this in My Bookings at any time.
booking.reduceGuests: Please reduce the number of guests.
booking.notEnoughSpace: Not enough space available. Please reduce the number of guests.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your stay details
profile.helpText: Need assistance? Please contact the front desk or visit our reception.

duplicateWarning.title: You already have a booking

roomBookingAlert.alreadyBooked: {{name}} has already booked this time slot for your room ({{count}} guests). You can view this in My Bookings.

errors.sessionFull: This session is full. Please choose another time.
errors.slotFull: This time slot is full. Please choose another time.
errors.outsideStay: You can only book activities during your stay dates.
errors.cancelCutoffPassed: The cancellation deadline has passed. Please contact the front desk.
errors.overlappingBooking: You already have a booking at this time.
